nodes.name: Quarterly Cron (Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct day 2, 13 UTC = 9 AM ET)
Emit broker source URLs (one item each)

parameters.query: UPDATE corridor_profiles SET character_broker_narrative = $1::jsonb WHERE corridor_name = $2 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND verification_status = 'verified' RETURNING corridor_name;

main.node: Emit broker source URLs (one item each)

meta._authoring_note: Draft. Pre-flight: (1) The alias table in the 'Explode + alias-normalize' Code node is a STARTER — add corridor aliases as you observe broker shorthand drift. (2) The Postgres UPDATE never INSERTs new corridor_profiles rows — broker narratives for corridors not in the table are silently dropped, surfaced in the audit step. (3) Run a diff query after the first trigger: SELECT corridor_name, character, character_broker_narrative FROM corridor_profiles WHERE character_broker_narrative IS NOT NULL — confirm `character` TEXT column is untouched (hand-authored content must not be overwritten).
